merchant_editorial: Welcome to The Settlement Hotel. Where heritage charm meets modern hospitality. Enjoy chef-prepared meals in our family bistro, from pub classics to winter warmers. Unwind with cocktails, tap beers, or a local wine by the fire in our terrace bar. Kids will love our indoor playground while you relax. Explore our curated bottleshop or host your next event in our function spaces. Need a night away? Stay in one of our cosy accommodation suites. The Settlement Hotel – your local destination for food, drinks, and good times.

merchant_editorial: Craving authentic New York–style bagels in Melbourne? At Lumen Alley, every bagel undergoes 18 hours of boiling and is baked fresh to achieve that authentic chewy texture. Our menu is simple, honest and wholesome. Serve with our house-made schmears, seasonal toppings with plant-based options, and carefully selected specialty coffee. Located in South Yarra near the Prahran market, we’re your comfortable everyday ritual. Come by for a slow morning, a quick bite, or coffee on the go, we’ve got you covered. And yes, puppies are welcome, too!
